plugins.name: dev-loop-skills
plugins.description: AI-driven development pipeline — 7 skills for test-driven dev loop (bootstrap, plan, write, run, evaluate). v0.2: Skill 1 ships with self-update.sh for drift detection + 3-layer self-evolution (check / refresh / rebootstrap).

plugins.name: prd2impl
plugins.description: PRD-to-Implementation pipeline — 14 skills for planning, task generation, parallel batch dispatch, and milestone verification. Per-scope plans_dir isolation for parallel milestones. v0.4: skill-chain wiring + framework-learning loop — smoke-test → dev-loop test-runner, /contract-check --preflight (cdcfdb2-class prevention), retro → superpowers:writing-skills, two-stage Yellow review, mock-policy reference.
